design_decisions.choice: CheckDeps derives release from status.Release for start_commit-null fallback
design_decisions.rationale: status.json already carries the release field; deriving the fallback ref from it avoids adding a caller parameter

design_decisions.choice: Git diff uses two-dot baseRef..HEAD to list changed files
design_decisions.rationale: two-dot diff against start_commit captures exactly the slice's own commits

design_decisions.choice: Undeclared dep detection: filter changed files for go.mod/go.sum, check against planned_files set
design_decisions.rationale: simple set membership; consistent with how the verifier's Gate 2 works

design_decisions.choice: Error message format: 'undeclared dependency file(s): go.mod, go.sum'
design_decisions.rationale: names the specific files so the user knows exactly what to add to planned_files

reachability_artifacts: manual-smoke-step: sworn lint deps --base HEAD~2 S01-test test-rel → exit 1, 'undeclared dependency file(s): go.mod' (fixture temp repo)
